# NOAA WPO REACH Dashboard
> A public web platform and open-science repository exploring Research Articles, Code, and Hosted Data (REACH) generated by the NOAA Weather Program Office (WPO).

This file maps out machine-understandable content streams to prioritize for Large Language Model (LLM) processing, indexing, and synthesis.

## Core Data Assets
- [AI-Optimized Data Table (CSV)](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/PART-WPO/reach-dashboard/main/Open%20Science%20Report%20(GitHub)%20-%20Open%20Science%20Report%20(1).csv): The complete, authoritative backend tracking spreadsheet containing raw data outputs.
- [Frictionless Data Schema Map (JSON)](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/PART-WPO/reach-dashboard/main/datapackage.json): The accompanying sidecar data dictionary defining types and constraints for the primary dataset.

## Appended AI Variables
The raw dataset contains machine-optimized columns appended to the end of the schema to avoid breaking frontend user interface rendering:
- **Cleaned Abstract**: Complete plain text abstract with HTML styling tags removed and text truncation repaired.
- **Standardized Date**: Chronological timeline tracking forced into mathematical ISO-8601 (`YYYY-MM-DD`) formatting.
- **AI Keywords**: Flat text thematic string arrays optimized for computational filtering and automated mapping.

## Main Links
- [Live User Interface](https://part-wpo.github.io/reach-dashboard/): Human-facing graphical map of the research output tracker.
- [GitHub Repository](https://github.com/PART-WPO/reach-dashboard): Root data storage and version control custody chain for the project ecosystem.
